title: Chibi Asuna Totem
description: Animated chibi Asuna totem of undying for Minecraft 1.16-1.21.11
body:
## About

**Chibi Asuna Totem** is a simple resource pack that replaces the default Totem of Undying with a chibi Asuna.  
It is made for Minecraft **Java Edition**.

## Features

*   Сustom 512x chibi Asuna texture for the Totem of Undying
*   Simple animation with multiple states
*   Custom Totem of Undying activation sound
*   All visual features of this pack can be seen in the screenshots and video showcase.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Jcy4_IlxoIE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Requirements

*   Minecraft **Java Edition** 1.16.2–1.21.11
*   No mods required – works on pure vanilla

__**Note:** Make sure all animations are enabled in the video settings. It's important!.__

## Credits

*   Textures, animation and sound: **marblock**
